fires_when: a new LM-calling step/node is added to a pipeline
core_claim: Reasoning shape is chosen by task structure, not by defaulting to CoT.

classify_questions.text: Does a correct answer require visible intermediate reasoning?
Does producing the answer require acting (tool/data/computation)?
classify_questions.none: neither a tool nor deterministic computation is needed

selection_card.cost: 1 call, no reasoning tokens — lowest overhead
selection_card.evidence: dspy.ai/learn/programming/modules/; lib dspy Core Concepts Predict

selection_card.cost: 1 call + reasoning/rationale field — adds output tokens
selection_card.evidence: dspy.ai/learn/programming/modules/ (default); lib dspy Core Concepts CoT

selection_card.task_structure: tool-use: search / API / DB / retrieval / calculator
selection_card.cost: N calls — think -> act -> observe loop
selection_card.evidence: dspy.ai/learn/programming/modules/; lib dspy Core Concepts ReAct

selection_card.task_structure: math / counting / unit conversion / strict parsing
selection_card.cost: 1 LM call -> generated code -> executed; answer grounded in execution
selection_card.evidence: dspy.ai/learn/programming/modules/; lib dspy Core Concepts PoT

tie_breakers.situation: math but you trust mental arithmetic
reasoning helps AND a tool exists
tie_breakers.why: ReAct does CoT inside its loop

tie_breakers.action: dspy.MultiChainComparison or dspy.majority over N CoT samples

tie_breakers.situation: tool is a trivial pure function, no I/O
tie_breakers.action: inline it; use CoT or Predict not ReAct
tie_breakers.why: tool-less ReAct loop is wasted calls

measure_step.rule: A heavier shape is justified only if it beats the next-cheaper shape on 5-10 hand-picked examples.
procedure: keep heavier shape only if answers change for the better
measure_step.exit_criterion: plausible outputs on 5+ examples AND no cheaper shape matches

dilemma_cases.name: CoT on a simple classify wastes tokens
dilemma_cases.extractable_operation: Closed-set classify/lookup defaults to Predict; promote to CoT only after Step 3 measures a label change.

dilemma_cases.name: ReAct without tools is just CoT
dilemma_cases.extractable_operation: ReAct earns its loop only with at least one real I/O-bearing tool; tool-less ReAct downgrades to CoT.

dilemma_cases.name: Math step: CoT prose vs PoT executed code
dilemma_cases.extractable_operation: Any step whose answer is a computed number/count/parse defaults to PoT; CoT prose is not executed code.

anti_patterns: CoT-everywhere reflex (safe != free; reasoning field is a per-call token tax)
ReAct with no real tools (CoT plus loop overhead and failure modes)
CoT prose as a math guarantee (use PoT for computed answers)
Picking shape by feel after writing the prompt (shape is upfront/structural)
Conflating shape with optimizer (MIPROv2 cannot fix a wrong shape)
Predict on a genuinely analytic task (under-powering)
One shape for the whole pipeline (decide per node)
